name: CblTalnIdsMaraClnclClsTermDtUpdate

text.value: WITH CTE_Input AS (SELECT @{pipeline().parameters.CurrRunCycle} AS RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.CurrDate} AS TERM_DT_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.SrcSysCdSk} AS SRC_SYS_CD_SK) UPDATE @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.MARA_CLNCL_CLS SET TERM_DT_SK = CTE_Input.TERM_DT_SK FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.MARA_CLNCL_CLS AS T JOIN CTE_Input ON 1 = 1 WHERE T.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK < CTE_Input.RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK AND T.SRC_SYS_CD_SK = CTE_Input.SRC_SYS_CD_SK AND T.MARA_CLNCL_CLS_SK NOT IN (0,1)
